raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I was notified by Barclay 's about suspected fraudulent activity on my credit card. I declined that I had made the purchase -- {$800.00} to XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX ; and I was told they would credit my account and send me a new card. 

When I received my statement for XXXX my purchases were listed at {$1600.00} with an XXXX credit ( the only activity being for XXXX XXXX XXXX ) . When I called I was told that they had deemed the purchase NOT to be fraudulent. In the letter I received it said because the card was in my possession and chip technology was used. 

I sent a letter asking the claim be reviewed since I did not use the card that day ; I was at my workplace from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  that day and my employer sent a letter to confirm. I requested that I have in writing the exact location and time that the card was used so that I could file a police report and I have not been given that information. I had another letter telling me that the transactions identified are not fraudulent.
